programme.title: Bad Girls Club: Back for More

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: Back for More

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: Back for More
programme.desc: Cracks form in the twins' relationship with Jela; Jasmine's birthday celebration leads to a breakdown; Kat discovers that she's on the girls' hit list.

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: Back for More
programme.desc: Rivalries resurface when a new bad girl enters the house; Kat is dealing with her insecurities and realizes that she needs to figure out what she wants out of the Bad Girls Club.

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: Back for More

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: Back for More

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: Back for More

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: Back for More

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: Back for More
programme.desc: The girls tie up loose ends while away in San Diego; Kat struggles to walk out of the house a changed woman; Laura has her final sessions with the girls.

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: Back for More

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: Twisted Sisters

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: Twisted Sisters

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: Twisted Sisters

programme.title: Bad Girls Club: Twisted Sisters

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Ever since extended family members were put on the payroll at The Tailgate in Santa Clarita, CA, business has taken a nosedive.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon is in New Mexico to help Mike, the owner of Lucky 66 Bowl, who is over a million dollars in debt and keeps driving customers and employees out the door with his temper.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: The feud between the owners of Mac & Chester's SRO has led to a bifurcation of their business and attracted a dysfunctional, rowdy clientele.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon helps bring a golf-themed establishment up to par by getting rid of the grime and reassessing the staff.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon looks to re-establish a sense of unity at O'Banion's in Nebraska, where a binge-drinking owner has been usurped in a hostile takeover by his partners.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon's attempt to save the YNot Sports Pub & Grub gets off to a bad start when there isn't enough staff on hand for a stress test.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon must help the owner of George & Dragon come to terms with his mother's death before he drinks away all his profits and the family legacy.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: The owner of the Summit House Grill and Tap has pushed his marriage and business to the breaking point by drinking away his financial sorrows and hitting on female patrons.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon is called in to help the owner of an Omaha, NE, hookah bar whose money is going up in smoke thanks to his staff's frat-house ways.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: If Jon wants to save the mice-infested, touristy Fort One Bar & Lounge, he'll need to get the spoiled owner who was gifted the bar to stop taking it for granted.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon is brought in to help save a bar whose controversial lobster-tank claw-machine game drew protests from animal rights activists, which in turn drove away customers.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon heads to Pepe's Mexican Restaurant & Cantina in Canyon Lake, California, to help a once-bustling bar that's now a ghost town and open the disconnected owners' eyes.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: An Irish bar owner's American dream threatens to go up in smoke when Jon discovers he's been withholding employees' paychecks to keep the business afloat.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon tries to help the owner of a failing Portland, Oregon, bar cool the temper of his stubborn chef and his overbearing stepdaughter turned business partner.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: After he tries to save Tanner from his abusive father, Mitch ends up on the wrong side of the law. Meanwhile, Jessie's irresistible charm makes a stunt pilot's heart take flight.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: When caught up in a high-risk adventure at sea, Craig tells Mitch a shocking secret. Meanwhile, Jessie works to creatively end JD and Cody's rivalry during a beachside triathlon, and April comes clean with Manny.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Mitch feels the need for speed when Tanner's cousin, Damon Lusk, a race car driver in town for a major competition, visits Baywatch. Meanwhile, Newmie and the gang develop a TV show about lifeguards that they try to sell it into syndication.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: After Mitch's lifeguard buddy's ex-wife dies in Australia, Mitch and the team accompany him on a trip down under to meet the son he's never known.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: While team Baywatch prepares to compete against the Australian guards, Jake must choose between staying down under with his son or returning home. The competing lifeguards must put their intense rivalry aside to save a life.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Cody learns a lesson in love when he and Mitch help a troubled violinist escape her dangerously overbearing mentor with a secret agenda. Meanwhile, Alex sets out to prove her worth at Baywatch by retaking the grueling rookie test with Jessie.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Alex tries to save a diamond smuggler whose partners want him to "sleep with the fishes." Neely makes Hobie a tempting offer that divides the Buchannon household.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: After Manny suffers a life-altering injury during a rescue, April tries to save him from himself. Neely meets her match in Alex when she tries to discredit Mitch.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: April and Jessie search for the perfect celebrity host for a seaside beauty contest. Mitch and Alex help Manny adjust to his paralysis.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Alex's search for the creator of several elaborate sandcastles is interrupted when she gets stuck entertaining her best friend's fiancée, who falls madly for Mitch. Cody loses his cool when his new boat is stolen while he's scuba diving with Newmie.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Craig rescues a woman that develops a fatal attraction to him, placing Craig's wife in mortal danger. A fishing trip goes horribly wrong when the boat explodes and Mitch and his mentor Al have to rescue its passengers, including Mitch’s son Hobie.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: Playing hooky from summer school, Lt. Mitch Buchannon's son Hobie gets dangerously involved with reckless jet skiers.

programme.title: Baywatch
programme.desc: During the hottest day of the summer, Craig has to choose between his career as a lawyer and the job he loves being a Baywatch lifeguard. The choice is made when two boys get trapped in a storm drain which is rapidly filling with water.

programme.title: Bellator 200: Carvalho vs Mousasi
programme.desc: Bellator MMA’s historic 200th event in London features Rafael Carvalho putting his middleweight world title on the line against one of the best in the world, Gegard Mousasi. Plus, Michael “Venom” Page looks to finish David “The Caveman” Rickels.

programme.title: Bellator 201: Macfarlane vs Lara
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to California as women’s flyweight world champion Ilima-Lei Macfarlane looks to defend her title against fast-rising Colombian sensation Alejandra Lara. Ryan Couture takes on Saad Awad, and Juan Archuleta returns to action.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to Thackerville, OK as Julia Budd puts her women’s featherweight world championship on the line against the undefeated Talita Nogueira in the main event.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes to Sioux Falls as South Dakota native Logan Storley looks to extend his undefeated streak as he takes on the always dangerous AJ Matthews. Bantamweight king Darrion Caldwell moves up to featherweight to face Noad.

programme.title: Bellator 205: McKee vs Macapa
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes to Boise, Idaho with an explosive featherweight main event as rising star AJ McKee takes on dangerous veteran John Macapa. Also looking to stay undefeated is Rafael Lovato Jr. as he faces fellow submission specialist John Salter.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA comes to San Jose. Legends Rampage Jackson and Wanderlei Silva settle the score with a rematch ten years in the making. Finally, in the main event Gegard Mousasi defends his Middleweight belt against Rory MacDonald.

programme.title: Bellator 207: Mitrione vs Bader
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to Mohegan Sun as Matt Mitrione faces off against Ryan Bader in the Heavyweight World Grand Prix semifinals. Roy “Big County” Nelson takes on dangerous Russian Sergei Kharitonov, and top welterweight contender Lorenz Larkin returns.

programme.title: Bellator 208: Fedor vs Sonnen
programme.desc: Bellator MMA invades Long Island as MMA legend Fedor Emelianenko takes on the American Gangster Chael Sonnen with the winner advancing to the finals of the Heavyweight World Grand Prix. Also, Benson Henderson and Cheick Kongo return to the cage.

programme.title: Bellator MMA Full Fight Cards
programme.desc: Bellator MMA returns to Israel with a featherweight world title fight as Patricio Pitbull puts the belt on the line against Emmanuel Sanchez. Also Light Heavyweights Phil Davis takes on Vadim Nemkov.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Jana & Allen say neighbors Maritha & Melanie moved into the neighborhood: police reports, DFS, threats & their 4 dogs bark all hours of the night! Maritha & Melanie point to Jana & Allen, with Melanie being charged with misconduct for mooning a neighbor!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Robin & Daniel, both want custody of daughters, Dani, 14, & Zoey, 12, who've been torn between both parents for years. What will happen to Dani and Zoey? Find out as we meet the whole family,to see if they are ready to receive help and move forward.Pt. 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dan & Teresa say identical twin sons, Dallas & Drew, 16, are violent, destructive & dangerous. What's at the root of the teens' anger & extreme jealousy? Dr. Phil examines the jealousy & torment driving these siblings apart & throwing the home into chaos.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Have you ever looked in the mirror and thought, "If I could lose five more pounds, I'd be perfect"? Darlene and Jennifer have been starving themselves in the name of perfection, but are they also killing themselves on their quest?

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Shelby wants to find the truth about her dad's online relationship with a woman he's never met. Dad David says "Maria" has a $10 million inheritance and says he knows for a fact that "Maria" is a real person and he can't wait to introduce her one day.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Self-proclaimed "fat guy" Eric was 560 lbs, so he decided to go on an epic bike ride across America. His goals were to lose weight, write a book & repair his relationship with his wife. His story went viral, as critics said Eric was scamming America.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues with the family of Amy, "Mother God", who says she can heal the world with her group, Love Has Won. The family alleges that Amy is a brainwashed "cult leader" and she is putting other people's lives at risk. Pt. 2

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil deals with several important issues about the body: conquering erectile dysfunction, taming a fitness obsession, and beating blushing.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: In a bizarre abuse case, Gypsy Rose Blanchard's mother forced her to pretend she was ill, undergo countless surgeries, shave her head, insert a feeding tube & use a wheelchair. A web of deceit & torture led to murder. Gypsy Rose talks with Dr. Phil.Pt. 1

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Trisha & Danielle are angry with dad, Ron, who they say abandoned their dying mother, his wife of 30 yrs, to plan a wedding with a Kennedy heiress he met online. His daughters say "Misty Kennedy" is a catfish. Ron says "Misty" is the love of his life.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Kathi says son, Nico, 14, plays video games all day & charged thousands buying tokens. Nico attended only six days of school this year & when disciplined, Nico rages, curses & terrorizes. Kathi says he learned this behavior from his dad, Evo; Evo agrees.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Dr. Phil continues his work with a family ripped apart by accusations of child molestation. Father Jason agrees to take a polygraph test to prove his innocence. Tune in to find out the results and what's next for this family!

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Aja says she is tired of caring for her entitled, drug-addicted mother, Janet, by allowing her to live with her for 8 of 10 years of her own marriage. Aja cites costs of $100,000. Janet rejects: she pays rent & regularly goes to Narcotics Anonymous.

programme.title: Dr. Phil
programme.desc: Caylee Anthony's image has been splashed across magazine covers and TV screens in an effort to find the missing 3-year-old. With the bizarre twists and turns in this story, Dr. Phil's panel of experts probe into the case that has captivated millions.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: When Jake Clampett tells Jed he's his cousin, he's welcomed into the home and soon has everyone but Jed thinking about and dressing for a role in their next movie.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Elly bonds with the Thanksgiving turkey so the family can't bring themselves to kill it.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale has a garden party and 'invites' the Clampetts by mistake.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale needs investors for his real estate development project, so he enlists the Widow Fenwick

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts decide to get a taste of culture to fit in the high-class society of Beverly Hills.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale's idea for Christmas presents are ones only fit for coastal California

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny tries to find the perfect man for Elly May.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny encounters a kangaroo, and thinks she's found a giant jackrabbit, but no one will believe her.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: A father and daughter from back home come to Beverly Hills to meet Jed.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Lafe Crick comes back in another scheme to get rich off the Clampetts' wealth.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Elly May competes in a contest to determine "The Queen of Beverly Hills."

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Dr. Martin of the zoo keeps giving Ellie more critters than Granny can stand. While Jim Gardner (or Jim Garrrrr!) comes to sell "bug vittles" but ends up falling for Ellie.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed and Mr. Drysdale try matching Ellie with the bank's new CPA Fred Penrod (or Rod Fredpen) while Lafe continues to try to find where "Jed has his money buried".

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Lafe Crick tries some match making with his son Dub and Ellie. Jed has his reservations.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale tries to get the Clampetts interested in deep-sea fishing by sending them to Marineland. Thinking that it's a fishing hole, Granny wants to "catch the whale".

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: It's tonic time in Beverly Hills. Granny's made a batch of tonic and sends a sample to their new neighbor, the Countess Maria. She loves it and throws a party to celebrate.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale is having a ground-breaking ceremony for a new bank building and the Clampetts think they need to pitch in to help build it. Meanwhile, Mr. Drysdale's associates try to get stock market tips off of Jed.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts get a big food package from home and Mr. Drysdale's two associates, Mr. Lucus and Mr. Pendleton think that the crawdads have something to do with the development of military reconnaissance technology.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale has Jed buy a Beverly Hills dress store for an investment and the Clampetts show up to help "the poor widow and her starving girls".

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: The Clampetts try to turn their newly acquired Beverly Hills dress boutique, The House of Renee, into a country store, The House of Granny.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jed sends Elly to the Beverly Hills dress boutique he used to own (now the House of Maurice) to learn how to be a lady, where Mrs. Drysdale mistakes her for royalty.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale wants Jed to incorporate for the tax advantages. So the Clampetts take over the top floor of the Commerce Bank and start doing what they can to stimulate the economy by getting more money into the hands of more people.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Granny's driving and Ellie's cooking makes a policeman and a cab driver think that the Clampett Mansion is a mental institution.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale gets Jed's old cabin from back home and sets it up in the Clampett's backyard to surprise Granny on her birthday. A coed with a sociology major thinks that they live there as the Drysdale's servants.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mrs. Drysdale hires a demolition man to remove the Clampett's cabin. Mr. Drysdale decides to occupy the cabin so it can't be removed. The Clampetts think a "homewrecker" is breaking up the Drysdale's marriage.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Jethro's running late for his graduation ceremony despite his new watch. Mrs. Potts of Jethro's school is afraid that his attendance will jeopardize her chances for a new endowment. Cousin Bessie saves the day.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: Mr. Drysdale buys Mammoth Pictures, a movie studio. Jed, Granny, Elly and Jethro try to "help" the studio, which is losing money, by working at the studio.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S05E007) When the fire marshal shuts down the After Dark for violating capacity, Steve suggests purchasing the space next door.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S05E008) Dylan's desperation becomes obvious to all when he takes out his gun and shoots up his living room.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S05E009) Dylan's closest friends stage an intervention at Casa Walsh, where they beg him to enter rehab.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S05E010) As Dylan lies in a coma fighting for his life, he experiences a number of bizarre dreams involving Erica, his drug dealer, and his dead father.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S05E011) The campus erupts in controversy when an accused anti-Semite is asked to give a speaking engagement at the school.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S05E013) Emily Valentine returns to Beverly Hills hoping to reunite with Brandon, and even his devotion to Kelly can't dampen the sparks that still burn between them.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S05E014) The courts decide on a punishment for Steve, whose illegal rave resulted in the fire that almost took two lives.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S05E015) After reading Erica's plea for help, Dylan leaps into action and hires a private investigator to help him track down her kidnappers.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S05E016) While working off his community service Steve meets a victim of Alzheimer's Disease, whose life story inspires Steve to make the most of his own.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S05E017) A motorcycle road trip inadvertently leads Brandon and Dylan to an ancient Native American ceremony where the two friends learn valuable lessons.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S05E018) Dylan and Valerie fly to Mexico, where they hope to rescue Erica and reclaim Dylan's inheritance.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S05E019) Kelly distances herself from everyone that matters to her as Finley's hold on her grows stronger.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S05E021) Brandon seeks Dylan's help with both taking down Professor Finley's cult-like organization and reuniting with his girlfriend, but when it comes to Kelly all bets are off.

programme.title: Beverly Hills, 90210
programme.desc: (S05E022) As the new owner of the After Dark, Valerie uses her newfound leverage to force Ray to continue their affair. But Ray has never been one to follow orders.

programme.title: The Jeffersons

programme.title: The Jeffersons

Rose receives an offer to buy her building from a real estate magnate whose plan to renovate means tearing down 227.
In charge of the big choir competition, Mary must make room in her have for the visiting choir's deacon, who is notoriously arrogant, thoughtless and pushy.

programme.title: The Best Of Flip Wilson
programme.desc: Rev. Leroy visits a monastery; Burns & Schreiber improvise machines and Fifth Dimension members do a dating sketch with Flip.

programme.title: Roc

programme.title: Roc

programme.title: Roc
programme.desc: Roc is eager to form a business partnership with a wealthy white man, Jim Larson, until he learns that the man is a racist.

programme.title: Roc

programme.title: Roc

programme.desc: The sit-down between KP and Lemeir brings about a revelation that catches Ceaser by surprise and leads to new alliances within the Crew. Star and Tim try to ease the minds of team IAM as a deadline is set to recommit to the shop.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Los Angeles

programme.desc: KP and Tim are disappointed to learn that their artists were at Barbie and Danielle's pop-up shop. During a team tattoo lesson with Cory, Nessie explains how she and the other women in the shop were passed over by KP for a potential client.

programme.desc: Barbie opens up to Dani about relationship issues and pushes Bone to make amends with her father. After suffering a personal loss, Ink is surprised to find out that Vudu and Nessie quit IAM. At the IAM grand opening, Star drops some big news on KP and Tim

programme.desc: KP, Nessie, Lemeir and Star each discuss what went down during pre-COVID filming that led to the current drama. Nessie reveals tension with KP stemming from his unwillingness to hire her ex. Self-promoting at the Pasadena Tattoo Convention causes a rift.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Los Angeles
programme.desc: The IAM team holds auditions in search of new artists. Tensions rise when Armani reveals who Star was hanging out with and a major decision is made regarding her future. Barbie confronts Bone about his cheating. Nessie is shocked when a celeb client calls

programme.desc: Kat talks terms with Nessie for her guest spot and is surprised by a former employee pop-up during a high-end client tattoo. Nessie throws Vudu a 30th birthday celebration. Lemeir breaks difficult news about the shop to Barbie and Ken.

programme.title: Black Ink Crew Los Angeles
programme.desc: KP surprises his new artists on their first day by announcing he is going to have a party at the shop. Kat tries to reconcile with her former employee and is left feeling confused after some of his comments. The Mitchells welcome baby Sage to the world.

programme.desc: KP debates with the IAM team whether or not to attend Ceaser's opp-filled event, while Kat and Enigma prep art pieces to adorn the gallery walls. Lemeir looks to get back into the tattoo game and hopes that Ceaser's event is the perfect place to network.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando una niña de 4 años de edad, se pierde durante su estancia con un familiar en Mississippi, el UAC descubre algunas verdades sorprendentes como las carreras de equipo para encontrar a la niña y llevarla a un lugar seguro.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: El equipo de NCIS descubre un círculo secreto de peleas de perros, lo cual lleva a un miembro del equipo a hacer un movimiento inesperado.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Vance asigna a McGee, Torres y Bishop el cumplimiento de las medidas de protección frente al COVID en una cumbre de asuntos exteriores, donde descubren un vínculo con un caso de asesinato de otro equipo del NCIS.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: La evidencia del apuñalamiento de un sargento de la Marina lleva a Torres a conocer a su padre, Miguel (Steven Bauer), quien le abandonó cuando era un niño.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Mientras el equipo de NCIS investiga la muerte de un ciclista atropellado por un automóvil que se dio a la fuga, Gibbs se prepara para testificar en contra de un asesor financiero quien le robó millones de dólares a la Fuerza Naval.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Los derribamientos
programme.desc: Danny y Maria investigan el ataque a una embarazada víctima de un juego de pandilleros que golpean a civiles al azar. Mientras, Frank duda en promover a un oficial por temor a ser visto como favoritismo.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Enmiendas
programme.desc: Danny y Baez investigan la muerte de una mujer que recibió una dosis letal de lidocaína durante una cirugía plástica secreta. Mientras, Frank asigna a Jamie un caso frío y Erin prueba el "speed dating".

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Arreglos secretos
programme.desc: Danny y Maria investigan el asesinato de un profesor universitario involucrado en un programa de becas cuestionable. Mientras, Danny descubre que su padre ocultó que el fiscal del distrito lo investiga por ética y procedimientos.

programme.title: Blue Bloods (en español): Batallas de custodia
programme.desc: Erin investiga el caso de un policía acusado de matar a un sospechoso detenido. Frank le aconseja ceñirse a los hechos para evitar un escándalo. Mientras, Jamie insta a Eddie a perdonarla.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando una niña de 4 años de edad, se pierde durante su estancia con un familiar en Mississippi, el UAC descubre algunas verdades sorprendentes como las carreras de equipo para encontrar a la niña y llevarla a un lugar seguro.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando unos cuerpos ahogados misteriosamente son descubiertos en el desierto de Las Vegas, el UAC trata de averiguar la verdadera causa y el motivo de los asesinatos.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: Cuando se encuentran tres cuerpos con marcas de mordeduras de animales y humanos en una tumba poco profunda cerca de Milwaukee, la UAC tiene preguntas desconcertantes que responder.

programme.title: Mentes criminales
programme.desc: A medida que el UAC concluye una investigación sobre apuñalamientos inusuales en el estado de Nueva York, la visita de Morgan a un sobreviviente podría descubrir más preguntas que quedan para que el equipo responda.

programme.title: NCIS: Criminología Naval
programme.desc: Mientras el equipo de NCIS investiga la muerte de un ciclista atropellado por un automóvil que se dio a la fuga, Gibbs se prepara para testificar en contra de un asesor financiero quien le robó millones de dólares a la Fuerza Naval.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers use a police SUV and a taser to stop a fleeing man with a knife. A hit-and-run suspect crashes into a gas station. An unlicensed driver has warrants in Greene County, Missouri.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect leads Officers on a car chase before running from a K9. A PIT maneuver is used to end a stolen vehicle pursuit. A man claims he has crazy eyes when a Deputy suspects him of driving high.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A wanted man flees from Deputies with the hood up on a pickup truck. A suspect bails from a stolen truck and pretends he wasn't driving. A drunk driver is caught after a hit-and-run at a dance hall.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A motorcyclist gives up after leading Fontana Officers on a wild pursuit. A K9 is used to track a felony shoplifting suspect who fled a traffic stop. A Stop Stick is used to end a chase in Missouri.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A stolen TV hangs out of a van during a slow-speed pursuit. A woman bites her boyfriend during an argument in Florida. A man claims he received a stolen car from a relative.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A female driving a stolen car spins out and runs from Officers in Missouri. A burglary in progress leads Officers to a suspect breaking windows at a church. An altered tag is discovered to be stolen.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man gives Officers a fake name when he's stopped on a bike with no lights. Officers initiate a high-risk traffic stop on a reckless driver. A man is caught walking in traffic on the Vegas Strip.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A lengthy pursuit in Independence, MO goes off-road. Deputies chase a motorcyclist who claims he ran because he doesn't have a motorcycle endorsement. A man ingests fentanyl during a traffic stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A woman rams a police car and begs Officers to take care of her dog. A man tells Officers he was just a passenger in a stolen Honda. A woman crashes her bicycle while trying to elude Officers.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect is tased twice after a car chase. His passenger resists and is also tased. A driver refuses to exit his truck in Florida. A woman claims the pills in her purse belong to her sister.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man on a bike refuses to stop and tries to hide a drug-filled backpack. A motorcyclist's attempt to flee is foiled by a big rig blocking the road. Meth is found in a center console during a stop.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A female shoplifter flees in a stolen box truck and crashes into a retaining wall. A green Honda runs in Wichita. A female passenger in Florida admits to hiding drugs and a pipe in her intimate area.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect makes a video call during a pursuit to apologize for relapsing. A burglar runs in circles in a vain attempt to elude Officers. A Sergeant finds a magnetic box full of meth and a hidden gun.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: The driver of a car with a loud exhaust admits he panicked and ran. A woman caught riding a stolen moped claims she borrowed it. A man is caught with a tool for deactivating security tags.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A driver speeds off when asked to step out of his truck. Deputies learn a man with a warrant for fentanyl is hiding in a backyard. A suspect steals a portable speaker after threatening an employee.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A suspect with an ATF warrant runs from a traffic stop and gets tased. Drones help locate stolen motorcycles in Fort Wayne. A suspect leaves behind soggy footprints when he bails from a stolen car.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers arrest a man suspected of robbery. A riot erupts at a juvenile party on the beach. Officers find an intoxicated man stuck on an iron fence.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A woman claims a man abused her then put a curse on her. Police arrest a man for having illegal drugs on him. An elderly woman locks herself in the restroom at a bank.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Two cousins fight over a five dollar debt. Police arrest a man for domestic violence. A taxi cab driver is robbed and shot.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Police arrest a suspect for armed robbery. A six foot alligator is found on a homeowner's back porch. An Officer assists in an undercover sting.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Two suspects hit a car with their U-Haul truck. A suspect flees on foot after a car pursuit. An elderly man is selling fake jewelry.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Undercover Officers organize a buy-bust sting. Racoons hide out in a woman's chimney. A man gets pulled over for soliciting a prostitute.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Undercover Vice Officers pose as drug dealers in an illegal drug transaction. A man is pulled over and arrested for driving a stolen vehicle. Three men are caught robbing a coin machine.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: An Officer goes undercover as a prostitute. A woman finds a snake in her home. A man solicits himself to an undercover officer.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers go undercover as dealers on a street corner for a drug-reversal sting operation. A man's property is destroyed by his girlfriend's ill-tempered father. An officer spots an intoxicated man assaulting a woman.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: Officers engage in a foot pursuit after the passenger of a suspicious vehicle starts running. A man barricades himself in the house after stabbing his nephew. A teenager is caught ditching school to smoke marijuana.

programme.title: COPS
programme.desc: A man is captured after appearing on an episode of "America's Most Wanted". An Officer detains a man for drug possession. Officers serve a search warrant and find four suspects with narcotics in their home.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom investigates the murder of a Las Vegas photographer whose remains were dumped at a nearby body farm.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Catherine and Sara are called in to investigate when a hockey player dies during a practice. Warrick and Nick look into the apparent drug-related death of a sax player at a casino.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom investigates the murders of four monks who were shot point-blank while chanting in a Buddhist temple.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: A bus carrying 23 passengers from Los Angeles to Las Vegas crashes less than 40 miles from its destination, killing nine people.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Jane Galloway is a nervous breakdown waiting to happen. She has completely shielded herself from the outside world, but that doesn't stop a stalker in her attic from killing her.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and Catherine investigate the stabbing death of an 80-year-old woman who lived in a run-down house full of cats.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and Sara investigate when a man's body, which has been doused with lye, is found buried in a park.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his crew handle their highest profile case to date when the city's former chief of detectives is slain execution-style in his house following a wild party.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate when the body of an unidentified young woman is discovered stuffed in an overturned shopping cart near a freeway underpass.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Catherine and Nick investigate street racing after one of the drivers is found dead out in the desert at an abandoned airstrip.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and his team investigate a crime involving a popular actor.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom and Catherine investigate the murder of a wealthy couple who are found outside their home, which was up for sale.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom suspects murder when the body of a dwarf is found hanging from a rope high above a stage in a casino hotel where a convention of little people is being held.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Grissom, Warrick, and Sara investigate when a woman vanishes while taking part in a magician's act.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: La histeria se produce cuando un tiburón ataca a una mujer en la piscina de un casino de Las Vegas. El equipo de CSI debe determinar si el asesino es humano o tiburón.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Una convención de vampiros y hombres lobo está en el corazón de una investigación del asesinato en Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Sqweegel, un asesino en serie que está castigando a los héroes locales que albergan secretos ocultos, está a la caza en Las Vegas..

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Una mujer que sufre de una condición llamada "acumulación" se convierte en sospechosa de asesinato cuando se encuentra un cadáver enterrado bajo pilas de basura y escombros dentro de su casa.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando un estudiante universitario termina muerto después de un espectáculo de "Caminar con dinosaurios", el equipo de CSI debe determinar si su muerte fue un asesinato o un accidente.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando el equipo de CSI descubre los restos destrozados de un hombre, se encuentran con múltiples sospechosos que pueden ser responsables de su muerte.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Dos hombres son asesinados justo antes de exponer a una compañía de gas natural por envenenar a residentes en una ciudad agrícola. Ahora el equipo CSI debe descubrir quién es responsable de sus muertes.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: La caída fatal de un hombre desde el balcón de un hotel lanza al equipo de CSI a una investigación para determinar si su muerte fue suicidio o el resultado de un juego sucio.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Los CSI se propusieron localizar a un pedófilo sospechoso de asesinar a la esposa de un agente del FBI y secuestrar a sus hijos.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Cuando una foto aparentemente falsa de una prostituta muerta aparece en línea, el equipo de CSI sigue una pista para encontrar a la mujer que fue asesinada.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: El equipo de CSI vinculó un cuerpo con quemaduras graves a una posible ejecución por una silla eléctrica y a un legendario asesinato en Las Vegas.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: U+000AUna noche llena de celebración termina con una explosión cuando el director de una fundación de becas para sordos es asesinado por un mortal coche bomba, lo que llevó a Sara a interrogar a los estudiantes y profesores de la universidad.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Una donación de segunda mano se vuelve espantosa cuando se encuentra un cadáver en una caja. Mientras tanto, la esposa de Langston hace una visita sorpresa al laboratorio criminalístico.

programme.title: CSI
programme.desc: Langston testifica contra el famoso asesino de 'Dick y Jane', Nate Haskell. Mientras tanto, Nick recibe una llamada de un adolescente con problemas, Jason McCann, para advertirle del peligro inminente.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio faces a former nemesis who escaped his grasp once before, a case of stolen identity leads to murder, the question becomes "which one did it?"

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Florida's gator and snake-infested Everglades becomes ground zero for a number of unrelated murders just as fires engulf the rare eco-system.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Florida's gator and snake-infested Everglades becomes ground zero for a number of unrelated murders just as fires engulf the rare eco-system.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: When a small jet crashes into a residential neighborhood, the wreckage reveals a corpse in the cargo hold, along with a half-million dollars in cash.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The world of extreme skateboard videos turns deadly when the competition heats up inside the studio. Horatio and the CSI team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Tax season gets off to a bang when two IRS agents turn up dead. Horatio Caine and the CSI Team are called in to investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: South Beach Miami’s sexiest nightclub becomes a hotbed of revenge when murder closes the doors on a unique dating service.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: An eight-year-old girl becomes the innocent pawn in an ugly and abusive game that ends in murder. Horatio and the CSI team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A high school reunion turns deadly when a classmate acts on a 15-year-old grudge, Horatio and Yelina discover that Ray may still be alive.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSI Team works against a ticking clock to find the purported accomplice in a years-old ax-murder case before the convicted killer is executed.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The CSI team races against time to locate and deactivate a radioactive bomb set to go off in the middle of downtown Miami.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio and the CSI team face off with Miami’s notorious and deadly Mala Noche gang after a funeral becomes the scene of a murder.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: A family boating accident reveals a sinister plot by grifters to heist 10 million dollars in gold bars. Horatio and the CSI team investigate.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a teenage girl partying in Miami on her way to the Bahamas with her high school class.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio Caine y el equipo de CSI recrean una noche de libertinaje de una despedida de soltero para resolver un asesinato y encontrar a un novio desaparecido.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio Caine llama al Dr. Ray Langston del equipo de CSI de Las Vegas para que venga a Miami cuando se descubre una pierna amputada en los Everglades.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando Horatio y el equipo de CSI investigan quién o qué causó un horrible accidente de auto, se revelan los secretos más oscuros de ambos conductores.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: En la hermosa Miami, se están usando medusas mortales como arma asesina y regresa una misteriosa mujer del pasado de Jesse.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: La investigación sobre la muerte de un trabajador del censo coloca al equipo en una persecución de autos a alta velocidad y en una explosión que amenaza la vida de dos CSI.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Eric Delko regresa a Miami como testigo experto de la defensa y enfrenta a sus viejos amigos, Horatio y el equipo de CSI.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando la novia de Estados Unidos, Phoebe Nichols, arde en llamas durante un concierto, el equipo de CSI expone el lado oscuro del estrellato pop.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: El extraño caso de un hombre cortado por la mitad desconcierta a Horatio y al equipo de CSI, mientras que la lesión de Natalia pone a Ryan y a ella en peligro.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio y el equipo de CSI tienen 24 horas para descubrir si un hombre condenado a muerte es realmente culpable y Eric Delko vuelve a trabajar en el caso.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio Caine y el equipo de CSI resuelven el homicidio de un hombre que fue asesinado en el espacio exterior antes de devolver su cuerpo a la hermosa Miami.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio Caine y Delko deben viajar a la brillante y soleada Los Ángeles cuando un secreto del pasado de Jesse quizá permita que un asesino quede libre.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Horatio Caine y el equipo de CSI desentrañan el complicado misterio de un asesinato en un lugar de trabajo cuando encuentran a una odiada recepcionista asesinada en la hermosa Miami.

programme.title: CSI: Miami
programme.desc: Cuando el hijo de Horatio Caine, Kyle, regresa de la guerra, busca la ayuda de su padre y del equipo de CSI para resolver un inquietante asesinato.

programme.title: CSI: Miami

programme.title: CSI: NY

programme.title: CSI: NY

programme.title: CSI: NY

programme.title: CSI: NY

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The brutal stabbing of a young woman leads Detectives Mac Taylor and Stella Bonasera to Stuyvesant Town, the middle-class epicenter of New York City.

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: In a test of faith, Mac Taylor assigns Detectives Danny Messer and Aiden Burn to one of the CSI team’s toughest cases yet.

programme.title: CSI: NY

programme.title: CSI: NY

programme.title: CSI: NY

programme.title: CSI: NY

programme.title: CSI: NY

programme.title: CSI: NY
programme.desc: The investigation of a suburban kid found beaten to death in Van Cortland Park leads the CSI team to Tanglewood, home to a group of wannabe gangsters.

programme.title: CSI: New York: Hazlo realidad (S8 Ep2)

programme.title: CSI: New York: El caballero andante (S8 Ep3)

programme.title: CSI: New York: Oficial involucrado (S8 Ep4)

programme.title: CSI: New York: ¡Déjenme salir! (S8 Ep6)

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Frasier suspects that his gorgeous new girlfriend is just using him to get free psychiatric advice.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Mistakenly believing he's got a secret admirer, Frasier jeopardizes his new relationship by trying to double his pleasure.

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: After Maris freezes Niles' assets, he's forced to sublet his luxurious apartment and move into a "low-rent" complex.

programme.title: Acá las tortas (Los hijos de los ricos)
programme.desc: Don Chente y Dolores son un matrimonio que dirige una modesta pero exitosa tortería. Cuando sus hijos regresan tras terminar sus estudios en el extranjero, deberán lidiar con sus refinados gustos y constantes solicitudes económicas.

programme.title: ¿Por qué nací mujer?
programme.desc: Una familia se reúne para festejar el día de las madres. Ante tantos problemas, una mujer hablará lo que no ha dicho por años. Esposo, hijos y nietos escucharán su cansancio y agobio silenciado por la sumisión y la obediencia impuestas.

programme.title: Dos pesos dejada
programme.desc: Fermín, un taxista vividor, se enamora de la hija de una comerciante adinerada, pero sus intenciones de conquistarla pronto se vuelven obsesivas y pierden el rumbo, llevándolo a consecuencias inminentes y peligrosas.

programme.title: El barón del terror
programme.desc: Una víctima de la inquisición del siglo XVII regresa 300 años después como una bestia devoradora de cerebros a cobrar venganza.

programme.title: El Vampiro
programme.desc: Marta viaja a visitar a su tía enferma, pero al llegar se entera que su tía murió y decide quedarse en la hacienda, sin percatarse de que está a merced de los vampiros.

programme.title: Por qué peca la mujer
programme.desc: La chica de clase trabajadora de al lado es seducida por un estilo de vida muy glamuroso cuando un promotor aceitoso la ayuda a lanzarse como cantante en un club nocturno; se deshace de su novio decente y sencillo y pierde su brújula moral.

programme.title: Locura Musical
programme.desc: Un musical en tono de comedia, narrando las peripecias que realizan los encargados de un cabaret de élite en la ciudad de México para poder mantener el éxito alcanzado hasta entonces.

programme.title: Paranoia
programme.desc: Kale Brecht (Shia LaBeouf) pasa los días espiando a los vecinos, mientras cumple un arresto domiciliario de tres meses. Todo es juegos y diversión hasta que las cosas dan un horroroso giro hacia lo peor.

programme.title: Sin Rastro
programme.desc: Un hombre busca a su esposa desaparecida luego de que se rompe su coche en una ruta desierta.

programme.title: Sin Ley
programme.desc: Shia LaBeouf, Tom Hardy y Jessica Chastain protagonizan esta adaptación de la novela basada en hechos reales “El condado más húmedo del mundo”. Una banda de contrabandistas que huyen hacia el sueño norteamericano durante la “Ley Seca”.

programme.title: El señor de la guerra
programme.desc: Nicolas Cage, ganador de un Oscar®, protagoniza esta historia tensa y llena de acción sobre un famoso traficante de armas que vendió armas a dictadores y consiguió eludir la ley durante casi veinte años.

programme.title: Una propuesta indecorosa
programme.desc: Demi Moore y Woody Harrelson son Diana y David Murphy, una pareja corta de dinero que apuesta a un viaje corto a Las Vegas que les dé una mano de suerte. Pero las probabilidades parecen más atractivas cuando el millonario John Gage sube la apuesta.

programme.title: Frontera hostil
programme.desc: Luego de ser deportada, Claudia debe elegir entre reconciliarse con su padre, de quien está distanciada, o juntarse con un peligroso contrabandista para poder volver a Estados Unidos.

programme.title: Justicia roja
programme.desc: Un estadounidense (Richard Gere) está en China por un viaje de negocios. Le acusan de un brutal asesinato y se encuentra a merced de un sistema judicial extranjero que no entiende. ¿Encontrará al verdadero asesino antes de que sea demasiado tarde?

programme.title: Cosas que diría con solo mirarla
programme.desc: Una historia compuesta de cinco tramas entrelazadas que se centran en un grupo de mujeres cuyas vidas, en el transcurso de unos pocos días, se enredan, se erosionan, se enriquecen y, finalmente, terminan por cambiar para siempre.

programme.title: Mystic pizza
programme.desc: En esta tierna historia de anhelos de juventud, Julia Roberts, Annabeth Gish y Lili Taylor, son tres chicas trabajando en una pizzería y soñando con un futuro brillante fuera de su pueblecito Mystic, Connecticut.

programme.title: Quien ríe al último ríe mejor
programme.desc: Sally Field dirige un elenco de primeras figuras en esta mirada divertidísima sobre una telenovela dominada por los escándalos.

programme.title: Cómo asesinar a un millonario
programme.desc: Joan Rivers interpreta a la ama de casa de Beverly Hills, Irma Summers, quien está convencida de que su esposo planea matarla.

programme.title: Amigos con derechos
programme.desc: Un chico y una chica intentan mantener su relación estrictamente física, pero no pasa mucho tiempo antes de que aprendan que quieren algo más.

programme.title: Soltera a los 30
programme.desc: Cuando Kate cumple 30 años, sus amigas Evie y Charlie se ofrecen a hacer una fiesta, pero la fiesta se sale de control.

programme.title: Ella espera un bebé
programme.desc: Jake y Kristi eran dos jóvenes solteros locos y enamorados. Pero un año después, se convirtieron en dos adultos locos y casados atravesando una fase de transición.

programme.title: Robocop 2
programme.desc: En Detroit reina el caos debido a una huelga policial y a una nueva droga, y solo Robocop (Peter Weller) puede parar este alboroto. Sin embargo, se topará con un duro cíborg, por lo que Robocop necesitará emplearse a fondo para salvar la ciudad.

programme.title: Robocop 3
programme.desc: Los directivos de la OCP imponen una ley de desahucio para los habitantes de la ciudad. Robocop se unirá a los amenazados habitantes de Detroit para impedir que se cumplan los planes de la OCP.

programme.title: Robocop
programme.desc: Cuando unos criminales hacen volar por los aires a un policía modelo, un equipo de científicos y doctores le reconstruyen a partir de sus restos y le convierten en un organismo cibernético, programado para combatir el crimen sin descanso: Robocop.

programme.title: La agencia de la humanidad
programme.desc: Un thriller distópico ambientado en el año 2030 que ve al mundo en un estado permanente de recesión económica y enfrenta serios problemas ambientales como resultado del calentamiento global.

programme.title: Juego de ladrones
programme.desc: Un ladrón veterano (Morgan Freeman) contrata a uno más joven (Antonio Banderas) para ayudarle a hacer un último trabajo para saldar una deuda con la mafia rusa.

programme.title: Survivor (2015)
programme.desc: Incriminada por crímenes que no cometió, una diplomática (Milla Jovovich, El quinto elemento) trata de impedir un ataque terrorista en Nueva York. Con Pierce Brosnan y Dylan McDermott.

programme.title: El infierno
programme.desc: Benny ha sido deportado de los Estados Unidos a México, que está siendo destrozado por las guerras de los carteles de droga. Luego se involucra en el negocio del narcotráfico y comienza a subir de rango.

programme.title: Una última y nos vamos
programme.desc: Un grupo de mariachis salen de casa por primera vez para competir en un certamen nacional en la ciudad de México. Los 8 hombres tienen que soportar muchos desafíos, lo que parece ser una oportunidad de su vida, pronto podría conducir al final del grupo.

programme.title: Me late chocolate
programme.desc: Después de que su prometido muere inesperadamente, una mujer decide aceptar la vida y seguir su sueño de trabajar con chocolate.

programme.title: Amor a primera visa
programme.desc: Alejandro, un mariachi, y su mejor amigo, Canicas, aprovechan un encuentro casual como una oportunidad para hacer cambiar de opinión a la joven de la embajada, Rachel, que rechazó la solicitud de visa de su hija para visitar EE. UU.

programme.title: El Camino Correcto
programme.desc: Arturo, un niño de la ciudad de El Verde Bonao en la República Dominicana rural, aprovecha las posibilidades que se le presentan al ir a la ciudad con la esperanza de ayudar a su madre, que acaba de ser diagnosticada con leucemia.

programme.title: Whisky
programme.desc: Una comedia inspirada y hermosamente trágica sobre Jacobo, el dueño de sesenta años de una pequeña y anticuada fábrica de calcetines, es iluminado con detalle inexpresivo, repetitivo y monótono. Subtitulada.

programme.title: Tod@s caen

programme.title: Yes Virginia, There Is A Santa Claus

programme.title: Christmas at Rosemont (LAS)
programme.desc: Atrapada en una tormenta de nieve cinco días antes de Navidad, Lisa, de 23 años de edad, y su nuevo amigo Brad, un snowboarder profesional, se refugian en The Rosemont.

programme.title: Todo Gira Alrededor de la Navidad
programme.desc: Una mujer debe elegir entre un trabajo de Nochebuena o unas vacaciones con su novio.

programme.title: Equilibrium

programme.title: Escondete
programme.desc: Dos parejas jóvenes han elegido un nuevo sitio para su borrachera: un cuartel abandonado donde hace 45 años, una niña, con discapacidad mental, fue seducida y violada, estrangulada y luego quemada.

programme.title: Mega Piranha (LAS)
programme.desc: Una cepa mutante de pirañas feroces gigantes escapan del Amazonas y se dirigen a Florida.

programme.title: Los Wánabis

programme.title: Mi suegra y yo
programme.desc: Historia que relata las dificultades por las que pasa una pareja recién casada cuando acepta la visita temporal de la suegra, quien tiene un carácter intenso y fuera de control, lo que pondrá en riesgo la unión matrimonial.

programme.title: Popeye

programme.title: Un par de seductores

programme.title: Green Acres

programme.desc: Farmhand Eb plans to take his girlfriend to a fancy restaurant for her birthday. Only problem is he can't afford it. Oliver encourages Eb to get creative and figure out how to earn the money himself. And if Eb is anything, it's creative.

programme.title: In The Heat Of The Night
programme.desc: The shooting of the campaign manager of a white supremacist politician appears to be a botched assassination attempt on the Senate candidate himself, but it soon reveals a web of deceit and betrayal. Was the assassination botched intentionally?

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: El infiel

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando Rosemary Anderson es encontrada muerta a un lado de la carretera, su novio se convierte en el principal sospechoso.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2007, el trailer de Effie y Michael Ratley en Florida se incendia y Michael heroicamente rescata a su esposa e hijo. Un mes después, su esposa es encontrada golpeada hasta la muerte en una habitación de la casa de sus padres.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Después de que el sospechoso fuera declarado culpable de incendio premeditado y asesinato, mantuvo su inocencia pero fue sentenciado a 25 años de prisión.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Ellos pensaron que el incendio cubriría su crimen. Pero una pequeña pista, no más grande que una tachuela, permaneció allí. Contenía toda la información que los investigadores necesitaban para poner a un trío de asesinos a sangre fría tras las rejas.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando encuentran muerta a la esposa de un dentista bien conocido, la policía se esfuerza por identificar a un sospechoso. Algunas fibras y un estudio de los patrones climáticos en la noche del asesinato abren el caso y revelan al asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Se encontró a Janice Johnson muerta al pie de las escaleras del sótano. La policía de Nueva Escocia tuvo que desenredar las circunstancias que rodearon la muerte de Janice y responder a la pregunta: ¿Fue un accidente o un asesinato?

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Los doctores del hospital no pudieron determinar la causa de las alucinaciones y el intenso dolor de Bobby Curley. Lo trataron como un trastorno neurológico pero su estado se deterioró. Él estaba siendo envenenado.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Las vacaciones familiares se convierten en una pesadilla cuando a una mujer la encuentran boca abajo en un lago.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2006, Kathy Augustine, una política de Nevada, murió misteriosamente durante una campaña de reelección. El médico forense no pudo aislar la causa de la muerte ni explicar las pequeñas heridas punzantes descubiertas durante la autopsia.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2008, el desarrollador inmobiliario de Colorado, Alan Helmick, fue encontrado muerto a tiros en su casa por su esposa Miriam, quien luego se convirtió en la principal sospechosa.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En una tarde cálida del verano, en el pueblo de Verona, Wisconsin, se enfrentaba a su primer triple homicidio. Para resolver este caso, los investigadores tuvieron que adentrarse en el mundo de jugadores de alto nivel y apuestas fuera del país.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando un miembro adinerado de la sociedad muere después de caer de las escaleras, los testimonios de los testigos contradicen la evidencia.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Reencuentro
programme.desc: Durante años, una mujer sufrió lo que parecían ser los efectos secundarios desagradables del litio, un medicamento recetado para tratar el trastorno bipolar.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Los jóvenes navajos del suroeste estaban muriendo a un ritmo alarmante. Los curanderos de la tribu proporcionaron a los investigadores una pista fundamental que llevaría al otro lado del mundo al asesino más improbable.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 2008, la respuesta de emergencia de Illinois atendió un incendio en un garaje y se encontró a un hombre aplastado debajo de un camión.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: El 15 de Octubre de 1985, dos explosiones de bombas sacudieron a Salt Lake City y resultaron en dos muertes. Una tercera explosión ocurrió al día siguiente; esta vez, la víctima sobrevivió.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Acechado en la noche
programme.desc: Cuando una víctima es brutalmente asesinada en su propia cama, los investigadores encuentran una huella de zapato en el barro de afuera, evidencia física que esperan que conduzca al asesino.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1996, Gayle Isleib, de 54 años, fue emboscada en su camino de entrada de Manchester, Connecticut, y asesinada a tiros. Ahora la policía debe determinar si el amor se convirtió en obsesión... y en un motivo de asesinato.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Fuego Plástico
programme.desc: Sheila Bryan, quien fue condenada por matar a su madre en el incendio de un carro, recibe un nuevo juicio. La opinión de un testigo experto en incendios sobre cómo se encendió el fuego difiere de la teoría de la fiscalía.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En 1995, la policía de San Diego está desconcertada por un par de manos encontradas en un contenedor de basura. A través de una investigación adicional, determinan que las manos son las de la persona desaparecida Don Hardin.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando una bomba casera estalló en una casa rural, la policía no tenía idea de quién era el responsable.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: Cuando una mujer desaparecía sin dejar rastro, había dos posibles explicaciones: secuestro o asesinato.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Intrusión bienvenida
programme.desc: Un hombre le dice a la policía que le disparó a un intruso que había atacado y asesinado a su esposa. El marido pinta un cuadro trágico y es apodado héroe.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En el 2007, Brian y Beverly Mauck fueron encontrados muertos en su casa en Graham Washington. Usando una huella de la palma de una mano y de un zapato en la escena del crimen, los investigadores enfocan su atención en Daniel Tavares, quien había tatuado la espalda de Brian.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos
programme.desc: En la escena de un asesinato horrible, el asesino se esforzó mucho para poder borrar sus huellas dactilares y oscurecer las huellas de zapatos que dejó cuando arrastraba los rastros de sangre en el piso.

programme.title: Crímenes imperfectos: Encontrar al sospechoso
programme.desc: Los atentados con bombas son difíciles de resolver, porque el perpetrador no suele estar en la escena y la evidencia se esfuma.

programme.title: Degrassi: The Next Generation

programme.title: Destination Wild: Wild Europe

programme.title: Destination Wild: Wild Europe

programme.title: Destination Wild: Wild Europe

programme.title: Destination Wild: Wild Far East
programme.desc: From tropical seas, and sweltering jungles, to frozen oceans, and wild, snow-capped mountains, the Far East is a place of truly epic natural beauty.

programme.title: Destination Wild: Wild Indonesia

programme.title: Destination Wild: Wild Indonesia

programme.title: Destination Wild: Wild Indonesia

programme.title: Destination Wild: Wild Islands

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: After five weeks on the road driving across the country, the Ricardos and the Mertzes arrive at their destination – Hollywood. With stars in her eyes, Lucy heads for the Brown Derby, a restaurant frequented by celebrities, with Ethel and Fred in tow.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy is jealous when Ricky is asked to pose with five beautiful starlets for publicity photos and tries to get herself in on the action by inserting herself into every shot. Lucy is even more upset when Ricky goes to his first Hollywood premiere.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy is desperate to appear in a Hollywood movie after hearing the Mertzes have bit parts in an upcoming feature. She sets out to be "discovered" and lands a part in an MGM musical. She plays a showgirl in a glamorous nightclub scene but has some trouble.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy convinces Ricky to allow her to buy a Don Loper dress so she'll fit in with the Hollywood scene. Lucy and Ethel hit the couturier's salon but soon realize the dresses are way out of their price range.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy arrives in Hollywood with Little Ricky to meet her husband and his new press agent, who intends on making Ricky the "Cuban Liberace." Charlie Pomerantz plans a publicity stunt he hopes will get Ricky into Hedda Hopper's gossip column.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy learns her husband's film Don Juan will be shelved and works frantically with the Mertzes and Mrs. McGillicuddy to prevent it from happening. Together they write hundreds of fan letters and dress up as members of the Ricky Ricardo Fan Club.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy has agreed to write an article entitled "What It's Like To Be Married To Ricky Ricardo" for a magazine when she learns from Ricky's press agent that Ricky is going to host a TV show. Lucy desperately wants to appear on the show with Ricky.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Ricky forgot the date of his 15th anniversary and desperately wires the records department in Greenwich, Connecticut where they were married to find out. In his defense, Ricky tells Lucy that he's already planned a big "surprise" anniversary party.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy learns a movie star, Cornel Wilde, is staying in the penthouse directly above the Ricardos' apartment and sets out to catch a glimpse of the handsome actor.

programme.title: I Love Lucy
programme.desc: Lucy and Ricky, and Fred and Ethel are fed up with each other's annoying habits and decide they all need a break. They split up for a brief vacation and Lucy and Ethel decide they'll go to Palm Springs for a girls-only good time.

programme.desc: Lucy's friend Caroline Abbleby decides she'll pay Lucy a visit while on her way to Hawaii, and can't wait for Lucy to introduce her to all the stars she has supposedly befriended. Lucy's only solution is to trick her friend and set the stage for deceit.

programme.title: I Love Lucy

programme.desc: Lucy decides that Ricky needs an agent to negotiate more money and cut down on his fruitless personal appearances, so she appoints herself. Her fast talking, no-nonsense actions result in the studio canceling Ricky's contract.

programme.desc: Although Ricky is having lunch with Richard Widmark, he refuses to introduce Lucy because she has become a legend around Hollywood for her crazy escapades.

programme.title: Cops

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives

programme.title: Los nuevos detectives

programme.desc: Junjie recounts the ancient history of the Eastern Caverns and his ancestors, and the events that led to his downfall and transformation from the Eastern Champion to the Dark Slinger.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: When Pronto accidentally uses the Emperor's sword blaster, he can suddenly do no wrong.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: The Emperor has returned! After the Shane Gang failed to defeat the Iron Warrior, the Emperor sets to work creating even more Unstoppable Warriors to reclaim the Eastern Caverns.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Junjie, Eli and the Gang rally their friends in the Eastern Caverns—and even some of their old enemies—to help them take down the Emperor and all of his Unstoppable Warriors once and for all!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: The Shane Gang return home to the 99 caverns to find Gateway Cavern overrun with slugs—in Eli’s absence, the Shadow Clan have governed by putting the slugs before the people, and the result is chaos!

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Eli and the Shane Gang take Tad under their wing, training him to blast like a pro and live by the slugslinger’s code.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: Tad is still missing after the slug-out with the Shadow Clan, so the Gang set off without him to investigate reports of slugs disappearing all across the 99 caverns.

programme.title: Slugterra
programme.desc: The Shane Gang are under non-stop ghoul fire as they struggle to put a stop to Tad’s plans and end the mass ghouling of slugs once and for all.

programme.title: Di-Gata Defenders
programme.desc: To rescue Kara from the Mortagarian's underwater realm, the Defenders are forced to steal the Tome of Al Mortagar (an ancient book that holds the secret to the original Sigils of power) and exchange it for Kara's freedom.

programme.title: Di-Gata Defenders
programme.desc: When Erik gets arrested for the destruction of the Tome of Al Mortagar, he has to survive in a Di-Gata prison, only to discover that the third icon is hidden within the prison, guarded by a powerful monster.

programme.title: Di-Gata Defenders
programme.desc: Erik goes searching for a temple to resurrect Kara only to discover that he must complete three dangerous tasks to get what he wants.

programme.title: Di-Gata Defenders
programme.desc: The Defenders investigate a mysterious case of vanishing children.

programme.title: Di-Gata Defenders

programme.title: Di-Gata Defenders
programme.desc: When Brackus and Rion are sprayed by a creature that makes them fall in love with Mel, Seth takes over Roodu and Azura's training.

programme.title: Di-Gata Defenders
programme.desc: Mel discovers that the vial keeping the trapped Ethos they captured from Von Faustien is missing, and the Defenders suspect Roodu and Azura.

programme.title: Bakugan: Battle Planet

programme.title: Bakugan: Battle Planet
programme.desc: The AO discover the only way to stop Magnus, and possibly save him. The AO must decide whether or not to help destroy the infected Fortus Core Cell.

programme.title: Bakugan: Battle Planet
programme.desc: The Hide Matrix goes crazy and a simple AO training mission turns into a complicated rampage. After the loss of their HQ, the AO are feeling a little off.

programme.title: Bakugan: Battle Planet

programme.title: Bakugan: Battle Planet
programme.desc: On a flight to their next Core Cell mission, the AO's plane falls under attack by Pyravian. The AO find themselves in a battle against the Bakuzon forces of Tiko.

programme.title: Bakugan: Battle Planet
programme.desc: The AO discover that Benton has been corrupted by the villainous Tiko. The AO are forced to turn to Philomena Dusk for help.

programme.title: Bakugan: Battle Planet
programme.desc: Parents of the world are turned against their children and confiscate their Bakugan. While the AO attempt to gain allies and warn other children, Wynton is confronted by Tripp.

programme.title: Bakugan: Battle Planet
programme.desc: When Lia battles with China Riot, they come to an understanding as China realizes she's been set up. On the run and with options dwindling, the AO turn to Shun's father for help.

programme.title: Bakugan: Battle Planet

programme.title: Bakugan: Battle Planet

programme.title: LEGO Jurassic World

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The ninja face off with an exhibit of a Stone Samurai Warrior that the toxic venom from the Great Devourer has brought to life while Garmadon manages to find a fabled Dark Island that is said to hold dark powers.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: The Ninjas, Lloyd, Sensei Wu and Misako journey to the Dark Island to find a ‘Temple of Light’ that can restore the Ninjas’ elemental powers but are attacked by Starteeth (barnacle-like star fish) that start eating through their ship.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: After battling off Garmadon’s Stone Army, the Ninjas finally arrive at the Temple of Light where they harness their pure elemental powers, concentrating them onto Lloyd who becomes more powerful than he ever imagined.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: When the Ninjas’ attempt to return Garmadon’s ‘Helmet of Darkness’ to its perch at the Celestial Clock in order to prevent the final battle between Lloyd and his father from beginning fails, a Super Weapon is created that can destroy all of Ninjago.

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu

programme.title: LEGO Ninjago: Masters of Spinjitzu
programme.desc: A great darkness has fallen upon Ninjago as Garmadon’s Super-Weapon has turned it evil but Lloyd and the Ninjas discover that light is more powerful than dark - and the final and ultimate battle is on.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Accidentalmente, el Abuelo descubre las habilidades boxísticas de Peluzín y se dedica a explotarlas. Mientras, el Noruego se embarca en la búsqueda de un nuevo hobbie.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego descubre por accidente que cuenta con poderes mentales y decide aprovecharlos para su conveniencia, mientras que el Diablo sube del inframundo para buscar un nuevo asistente en Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín trata de averiguar el paradero de su madre con la ayuda de sus dos nuevos papás, mientras que Gaspar invita al Abuelo, el Noruego y Johnny a el nuevo restaurante de moda.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Abuelo, con la ayuda de Gaspar, hace una lista de todas las cosas que quiere hacer antes de morir. Peluzin y el Noruego están adictos a un videojuego.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pitipú recibe una visita de su pasado el cual lleva muchos años tratando de dejar atrás, mientras que el Noruego se embarca en una búsqueda para conseguirle una madre a Olaf.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Irma organiza un club de peleas clandestinas, mientras que Pitipú decepcionado de sus conocimientos Bíblicos, decide embarcarse en el camino del mal.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín tiene éxito con un nuevo método de protesta, mientras El Noruego y Jony dan sus primeros pasos en la "cossa nostra"

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Peluzín adquiere una nueva mascota que revolucionará el vecindario. En tanto el Noruego y Gaspar intentan ayudar a el Lentejas a superar sus extrañas inclinaciones sexuales.

programme.desc: El Noruego decide ir a NY a conocer a la verdadera Ivanka pero en el camino el grupo se separa de el Abuelo y Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: El Noruego está cansado de la mala racha que ha tenido con las mujeres y busca el consejo de Pitipú, mientras que Peluzín le pide ayuda a Jonathan para poder encontrar a su verdadero padre.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: Pelu el Payaso le pide a Jony que sea su nuevo ayudante e inician una gira espectacular que da muchos frutos. Mientras tanto, el Noruego descubre su afición por los tatuajes.

programme.title: La familia del barrio
programme.desc: La familia va a Washington a pedir la mano de Ivanka con un resultado inesperado, mientras que Johnny busca deshacer la relación enfermiza entre el Abuelo y Peluzín.

programme.title: La familia del barrio

programme.desc: El Noruego está despilfarrando su fortuna peor que nunca, mientras que Pitipú, Don Sebas y Gaspar buscan solucionar el problema de plomería del edificio Pino.
